```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement ML data pipeline for training data preparation"
---
# ML Data Pipeline
## Task
Build a data pipeline for ML training data preparation.
## Requirements
1. Implement data loading from multiple sources. 2. Apply data cleaning and preprocessing.
3. Handle class imbalance (oversampling, undersampling). 4. Split data consistently (train/val/test).
5. Version datasets for reproducibility.
## Constraints
- Treat datasets/ as read-only. Output to data_out/. Reproducible splits with fixed seeds.
## Success Criteria
- Data pipeline automated. Cleaning consistent. Splits reproducible. Versions tracked.
```
